name: Tax-Free Procurement of Specially Denatured Spirits

eligibility.description: Requires filing an application and receiving a permit from the Secretary to use tax-free spirits under section 5214(a)(2) or (3) or specially denatured spirits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for the procurement, use, or recovery of distilled spirits free of tax for specific industrial or manufacturing purposes provided a permit is obtained.
